clues.clue: Covering page in proofreading mark
Silly play’s opening provided by cast
Mother of pearly king dropped into ocean travelling with us
Start to tuck into sandwich and roly-poly
Visitor worried after run out in dangerous country
Spots litter leader’s left
Lake bed holds solidified matter
One miracle involved splendid ritual
Writer of short musical and rotten novel
Be confronted by heartless travesty
Almost terrifying disfigurement
Discuss business while gobbling?
Tremble when delivering note
A couple of short marks, wrong and right: initially this makes sense
Most inscrutable spy’s heading under cover?
Function in business without Latin
Maidservant bearing a ring for religious leader
Interest announced for every case
Time without tea for so many? (A number)
Infatuation with a high-ranking Turk
Counterfeit sum taking people in is a bloomer
Palace attendant’s first opening after noon
Nobody is forgetting an old date
Orchestrate unusually sweet composition
Have high opinion of endless desert
Current work eliminating area’s gradual growth
Made a great effort as stone cracked
Run out of fortress, free in wild areas
Check address of page, an old peasant
Spring’s past, meadow pipit’s content to fly away
This legendary bird rises into heavens!
